# ===============================================================================
# TEMPLATE: Transcricao Anotada v1.0
# Purpose: Full transcript annotated with KEEP/REMOVE/BRIDGE markers for editors
# Generated by: content-miner-pro (Pass 4.6) via generate_annotated_transcript.py
# Input: raw transcript + {source-slug}/momentos.md (Top 50 moments)
# Output: {source-slug}/transcricao_anotada.md
# Used in: wf-mine-to-cut.yaml (Phase 1 output), format-cut (input)
# ===============================================================================

# TRANSCRICAO ANOTADA
# Full transcript with segment annotations for editor context
# KEEP = selected moment (in banco de momentos)
# REMOVE = discarded content (filler, setup, repetition)
# BRIDGE = transition material between moments (available for use)

# ===============================================================================
# YAML FRONTMATTER
# ===============================================================================

# ---
# source: "{source_name}"
# duration: "{HH:MM:SS}"
# duration_seconds: {N}
# generated: "{YYYY-MM-DD}"
# generator: "generate_annotated_transcript.py v1.0"
# banco_momentos: "output/curated/{source-slug}/momentos.md"
# transcript_source: "{path_to_original_transcript}"
# segments:
#   keep: {N}
#   bridge: {N}
#   remove: {N}
# cut_points_identified: {N}
# context_window_seconds: 2
# bridge_threshold_seconds: 30
# ---

# ===============================================================================
# DOCUMENT STRUCTURE
# ===============================================================================

# # Transcricao Anotada — {Source Name}
#
# **Source:** {source_name}
# **Duration:** {HH:MM:SS}
# **Segments:** {N} KEEP | {N} BRIDGE | {N} REMOVE
# **Generated:** {date}
# **Banco de Momentos:** output/curated/{source-slug}/momentos.md
#
# ---
#
# ## Legenda
# - **KEEP** = Momento selecionado (presente no banco de momentos)
# - **REMOVE** = Conteudo descartado (setup tecnico, filler, repeticao)
# - **BRIDGE** = Material de transicao disponivel entre momentos adjacentes
#
# ---

# ===============================================================================
# SEGMENT TYPES
# ===============================================================================

# --- KEEP Segment ---
# [HH:MM:SS - HH:MM:SS] KEEP — Momento #{N} (Score {S}, {tipo}, {gatilho})
#   MQR: H{n}/E{n}/S{n}/C{n}
#   "{first 80 chars of transcription}..."
#   Corte natural IN: HH:MM:SS ({reason}: fim de frase | pausa {N}s | respiracao)
#   Corte natural OUT: HH:MM:SS ({reason}: fim de frase | pausa {N}s | respiracao)
#   Contexto: {1-line description of what this moment is about}
#
# ---

# --- REMOVE Segment ---
# [HH:MM:SS - HH:MM:SS] REMOVE — {1-line summary}
#   Resumo: {What happens in this segment, 1-2 sentences}
#   Duracao: {Nm Ns}
#   Nota: {Optional: any rescue-worthy content with timestamp}
#
# ---

# --- BRIDGE Segment ---
# [HH:MM:SS - HH:MM:SS] BRIDGE — Material de transicao disponivel
#   "{Full transcription text of the bridge}"
#   Conecta: Momento #{A} → Momento #{B}
#   Uso sugerido: {When/how this bridge can be used}
#
# ---

# ===============================================================================
# CUT POINT SPECIFICATION
# ===============================================================================

# Cut points are identified for each KEEP segment:
#
# corte_natural_in:
#   - Scans up to {context_window_seconds} seconds BEFORE momento_inicio
#   - Looks for: sentence ending (period + pause), breathing pause (>0.5s),
#     speaker change, natural silence
#   - Format: "HH:MM:SS ({reason})"
#
# corte_natural_out:
#   - Scans up to {context_window_seconds} seconds AFTER momento_fim
#   - Looks for: sentence completion, thought completion + pause,
#     speaker change, natural silence
#   - Format: "HH:MM:SS ({reason})"
#
# If no natural cut point found within window, uses momento_inicio/fim directly.

# ===============================================================================
# BRIDGE CLASSIFICATION RULES
# ===============================================================================

# Gap between two KEEP moments is classified as:
#
# BRIDGE if:
#   - Duration < {bridge_threshold_seconds} (default: 30s)
#   - AND adjacent to at least one KEEP moment
#   - Full transcription text is included
#
# REMOVE if:
#   - Duration >= {bridge_threshold_seconds}
#   - OR clearly non-content (technical setup, dead air, off-topic)
#   - Only 1-line summary included
#   - May flag "rescue" content (single good phrases in filler)

# ===============================================================================
# QUALITY REQUIREMENTS
# ===============================================================================

# 1. COVERAGE: Every second of the transcript must be accounted for
#    (no gaps between segments)
# 2. KEEP segments must match banco de momentos moment numbers exactly
# 3. All KEEP segments must have corte_natural_in and corte_natural_out
# 4. BRIDGE segments must have full transcription text
# 5. REMOVE segments must have 1-line summary
# 6. Output size should be original transcript + <20% annotation overhead
# 7. Performance: <5 seconds for 4-hour transcript
